mandate: MANDATE: Correct usage of common utilities, threading, and logging in
remoting/base/. TONE: Zero Preamble. No conversational filler. Artifacts

auto_thread_usage: Use AutoThread correctly to manage thread lifetime via TaskRunner
use_host_log: Use HOST_LOG instead of LOG(INFO) in host code to avoid spamming
com_init_windows: Initialize COM correctly (STA/MTA) when creating AutoThread on
gce_context_required: Only use `ComputeEngineServiceClient` when running within a GCE VM
